content.full_text:
May 16, 2006

Steven L. Dorsey
Special Counsel to L.A. Care Health Plan
c/o Richards Watson Gershon
355 South Grand Avenue, 40th Floor
Los Angeles, California 90071-3101

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-204

Dear Mr. Dorsey:

The purpose of this correspondence is to confirm that since we have not received word from you since our last correspondence, we have withdrawn your request for advice on behalf of Dr. Jeffrey Penso.

As you recall, on March 17, 2006 I received a phone message from you that your advisee might not require advice in relation to his prospective nomination as a member of the Board of Governors of L.A. Care Health Plan, and that I should no longer work on analyzing the request for advice. In our last conversation, on April 6, 2006, you indicated that you would provide a decision soon as to whether you would be withdrawing the request. On April 25, 2006, we advised that unless we received word from you by May 1 that you continued to require advice, we would be withdrawing your request. We have received no word from you since then.

As stated in our correspondence dated April 25, 2006, if at a later date you determine that you do desire advice, you may simply request it anew at that time.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Andreas C. Rockas
Counsel, Legal Division
